text: Small daily improvements are the key to staggering long-term results.
author: Unknown

text: You don't rise to the level of your goals, you fall to the level of your systems.
author: James Clear

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
author: Tim Ferriss

text: Done is better than perfect.
author: Sheryl Sandberg

text: It's not about having time. It's about making time.
author: Unknown

text: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
author: Abraham Lincoln

text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

text: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Productivity is never an accident. It is always the result of a commitment to excellence.
author: Paul J. Meyer

text: The most effective way to do it, is to do it.
author: Amelia Earhart

text: Either you run the day or the day runs you.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Work hard in silence. Let success make the noise.
author: Frank Ocean

text: If you spend too much time thinking about a thing, you'll never get it done.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Your future is created by what you do today, not tomorrow.
author: Robert Kiyosaki

text: Eat a live frog first thing in the morning and nothing worse will happen to you the rest of the day.
author: Mark Twain

text: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule but to schedule your priorities.
author: Stephen Covey

text: One day or day one. You decide.
author: Unknown

text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence is not an act, but a habit.
author: Aristotle

text: Motivation gets you going. Habit keeps you growing.
author: John Maxwell

text: If it's important, do it every day. If it's not, don't do it at all.
author: Dan Gable

text: You will never always be motivated. You have to learn to be disciplined.
author: Unknown

text: Stop waiting for the right moment. Start now, start messy.
author: Unknown

text: Every expert was once a beginner. Every pro was once an amateur.
author: Unknown

text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
author: Tim Notke

text: Clarity about what matters provides clarity about what does not.
author: Cal Newport

text: The successful warrior is the average person, with laser-like focus.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Do the hard jobs first. The easy jobs will take care of themselves.
author: Dale Carnegie

text: Push yourself because no one else is going to do it for you.
author: Unknown
